This path calls getNextSqrtPriceFromAmount1RoundingDown(sqrtPX96, liquidity, amountOut, false).      The error triggers when sqrtPX96 <= quotient, where quotient = amountOut * Q96 / liquidity.      To trigger: set amountOut very large so that quotient >= sqrtPX96."},"test_getNextSqrtPriceFromOutput_revert_priceOverflow()":{"details":"Occurs when zeroForOne=false and removing currency0 causes overflow or underflow.      This path calls getNextSqrtPriceFromAmount0RoundingUp(sqrtPX96, liquidity, amountOut, false).      The error triggers when product overflows or numerator1 <= product.      To trigger: set amountOut very large so that amount * sqrtPX96 overflows or      liquidity << 96 <= amount * sqrtPX96."},"test_getNextSqrtPriceFromOutput_zeroForOne()":{"details":"Taking token1 output testFuzz_inputOutputRoundtrip(uint160,ui.details: Adding then removing amount should get back close to original price

testFuzz_roundingConsistency_amount0(uin.details: Round up should always be >= round down

test_getAmount0Delta_priceOrderIndepende.details: Function should handle either order of prices

test_getAmount0Delta_samePrices().details: Same prices should give zero amount

test_getAmount0Delta_signed_negativeLiqu.details: Negative liquidity means adding liquidity, returns positive amount

test_getAmount0Delta_signed_positiveLiqu.details: Positive liquidity means removing liquidity, returns negative amount

test_getAmount1Delta_priceOrderIndepende.details: Function uses absDiff so order shouldn't matter

test_getNextSqrtPriceFromInput_oneForZer.details: Adding token1 should increase the sqrt price

test_getNextSqrtPriceFromInput_zeroAmoun.details: Zero amount should return the same price

test_getNextSqrtPriceFromInput_zeroForOn.details: Adding token0 should decrease the sqrt price

test_getNextSqrtPriceFromOutput_oneForZe.details: Taking token0 output should increase the sqrt price

test_getNextSqrtPriceFromOutput_revert_n.details: Occurs when zeroForOne=true and output amount would cause sqrt price to go to 0 or negative.      This path calls getNextSqrtPriceFromAmount1RoundingDown(sqrtPX96, liquidity, amountOut, false).      The error triggers when sqrtPX96 <= quotient, where quotient = amountOut * Q96 / liquidity.      To trigger: set amountOut very large so that quotient >= sqrtPX96.

test_getNextSqrtPriceFromOutput_revert_p.details: Occurs when zeroForOne=false and removing currency0 causes overflow or underflow.      This path calls getNextSqrtPriceFromAmount0RoundingUp(sqrtPX96, liquidity, amountOut, false).      The error triggers when product overflows or numerator1 <= product.      To trigger: set amountOut very large so that amount * sqrtPX96 overflows or      liquidity << 96 <= amount * sqrtPX96.

test_getNextSqrtPriceFromOutput_zeroForO.details: Taking token1 output should decrease the sqrt price

testFuzz_roundingConsistency_amount1(uin.notice: Fuzz test: verifies rounding consistency for amount1

test_absDiff_aGreaterThanB().notice: Tests absDiff function for correct absolute difference

test_getAmount0Delta_basicCalculation().notice: Tests getAmount0Delta with known price range

test_getAmount0Delta_priceOrderIndepende.notice: Tests getAmount0Delta with swapped price order

test_getAmount0Delta_revert_zeroPrice().notice: Tests that getAmount0Delta reverts with zero price

test_getAmount0Delta_signed_negativeLiqu.notice: Tests signed getAmount0Delta with negative liquidity

test_getAmount0Delta_signed_positiveLiqu.notice: Tests signed getAmount0Delta with positive liquidity

test_getAmount1Delta_basicCalculation().notice: Tests getAmount1Delta with known price range

test_getAmount1Delta_priceOrderIndepende.notice: Tests getAmount1Delta with swapped price order

test_getAmount1Delta_signed_negativeLiqu.notice: Tests signed getAmount1Delta with negative liquidity

test_getAmount1Delta_signed_positiveLiqu.notice: Tests signed getAmount1Delta with positive liquidity

test_getNextSqrtPriceFromInput_revert_ze.notice: Tests that getNextSqrtPriceFromInput reverts with zero liquidity
Tests that getNextSqrtPriceFromInput reverts with zero price

test_getNextSqrtPriceFromOutput_revert_n.notice: Tests that getNextSqrtPriceFromOutput reverts with NotEnoughLiquidity

test_getNextSqrtPriceFromOutput_revert_p.notice: Tests that getNextSqrtPriceFromOutput reverts with PriceOverflow

test_getNextSqrtPriceFromOutput_revert_z.notice: Tests that getNextSqrtPriceFromOutput reverts with zero liquidity
Tests that getNextSqrtPriceFromOutput reverts with zero price
